results.title: Ladybirds no-hit by Patriots’ Dumarce in playoff exit
results.description: Caitlin Dumarce fires a no-hitter with 12 Ks and reaches 708 career strikeouts as West Carteret tops Southern Nash 2-0, clinching the program’s first 5-A East Regional berth.

results.title: One country, two realities
results.description: (Kaieteur News) – De Waterfall newspaper tell us people now begging to buy tennis rolls one-by-one. One-by-one. Like how we used to buy single cigarette from the back door during de Burnham days. Because a whole bag of six done get so dear, yuh would tink de baker rolling gold, not dough. But wait—dis ain’t just [...] The post One country, two realities appeared first on Kaieteur News .

results.title: Cavaliers rout the Pistons in Game 7 to reach the East finals
results.description: DETROIT (AP) — Donovan Mitchell scored 26 points, Jarrett Allen and Sam Merrill each added 23 and the Cleveland Cavaliers beat the Detroit Pistons 125-94 on Sunday night in Game 7 to advance to the Eastern Conference finals. The fourth-seeded Cavaliers ousted the East’s top seed and will face the third-seeded New York Knicks. Game [...]

results.title: Ikhlef Bags Silver At Asian Weightlifting Championships In India
results.description: (MENAFN - The Peninsula) The Peninsula Doha, Qatar: Qatar's Ouisal Ikhlef delivered an impressive performance at the Asian Weightlifting Championships in Gandhinagar, India, claiming silver in the ...

results.title: England's invincible Red Roses: The 38-game unbeaten run and a team 'pushing for perfection'
results.description: Four players are pregnant and a plethora out injured, but England’s Red Roses extended their record-breaking run on Sunday.
